content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: NorthBridge Consulting
Customer ID: C010
Contract ID: K007
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: New Business
Date: March 1, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed NorthBridge Consulting on DataSync Pro Starter at 10 users, $5,700 ARR after a 5% discount. Competitive deal against a well-established incumbent.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Champion is COO Patricia Wells. NorthBridge was using a legacy document management system that lacked real-time collaboration features. Their consultants were frequently working across client sites and needed reliable sync across devices and locations. DataSync Pro's offline mode and conflict resolution features were key differentiators.

CLOSING NOTES
The incumbent had a 5-year relationship with NorthBridge. Sarah Chen overcame this by demonstrating a side-by-side comparison of offline sync performance. The 5% discount was offered to reduce the switching cost risk perception. Patricia Wells made the final call after two rounds of internal review.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
NorthBridge has a consulting team of 45. Current license covers only the senior consultants. Strong expansion potential once the team sees the platform in action. Flag for expansion conversation at 6 months.
